title: Ccn name chaining
abstract: A method provides route transforming by a network device implementing a content centric networking (CCN) gateway or CCN router, where the CCN gateway or CCN router is part of a CCN network. The method transforms a CCN Name in a CCN request before forwarding in the CCN network. The method includes receiving a first CCN request including a first CCN Name, the first CCN Name including a route transformer identifier, generating a modified first CCN Name by removing the route transformer identifier from the first CCN Name, generating a second CCN Name from the modified first CCN Name; and generating a second CCN request including the second CCN Name.
claims:
Claims 1. A method for route transforming by a network device implementing a content centric networking (CCN) gateway or CCN router, where the CCN gateway or CCN router is part of a CCN network, the method to transform a CCN Name in a CCN request before forwarding in the CCN network, the method comprising: receiving (301) a first CCN request including a first CCN Name, the first CCN Name including a route transformer identifier; generating (305) a modified first CCN Name by removing the route transformer identifier from the first CCN Name; generating (307) a second CCN Name from the modified first CCN Name; and generating (309) a second CCN request including the second CCN Name. The method of claim 1, the method further comprising: generating (303) a pending interest table (PIT) entry for the first CCN Name from the first CCN Request. The method of claim 2, further comprising: generating (311) a PIT entry for the second CCN request that associates the first CCN Name, a transform configuration, and the second CCN Name. The method of claim 3, wherein the transform configuration identifies a process for generating the first CCN Name from the second CCN Name or a process for modifying a data portion of the second CCN Name. The method of claim 1, wherein the method is further configured to handle a first CCN reply before forwarding a second CCN reply in the CCN network, the method comprising: receiving (401)the first CCN reply including the second CCN Name; 

 applying (407) a transform configuration to the second CCN Name to obtain CCN reply data; and generating (409) the second CCN reply using the CCN reply data and the first CCN Name from a pending interest table (PIT) entry for the first CCN Name. The method of claim 5, further comprising: determining (403) whether a PIT entry exists for the second CCN Name. The method of claim 5, further comprising: forwarding (411) the second CCN reply according to the PIT entry for the first CCN Name. A network device to implement a method for route transforming, the network device in a content centric networking (CCN) gateway or CCN router, where the CCN gateway or CCN router is part of a CCN network, the method to transform a CCN Name in a CCN request before forwarding in the CCN network, the network device comprising: a non-transitory computer-readable medium (818) having stored therein a route transforming module; and a processor (812) coupled to the non-transitory computer-readable medium, the processor configured to execute the route transforming module, the route transforming module configured to receive a first CCN request including a first CCN Name, the first CCN Name including a route transformer identifier, to generate a modified first CCN Name by removing the route transformer identifier from the first CCN Name, to generate a second CCN Name from the modified first CCN Name, and to generate a second CCN request including the second CCN Name. 9. The network device of claim 8, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to generate a pending interest table (PIT) entry for the first CCN Name from the first CCN Request. 10. The network device of claim 9, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to generate a PIT entry for the second CCN request that associates the first CCN Name, a transform configuration, and the second CCN Name. 11. The network device of claim 10, wherein the transform configuration identifies a process for generating the first CCN Name from the second CCN Name or a process for modifying a data portion of the second CCN Name. 12. The network device of claim 8, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to receive a first CCN reply including the second CCN Name, to apply a transform configuration to the second CCN Name to obtain CCN reply data, and to generate a second CCN reply using the CCN reply data and the first CCN Name from a pending interest table (PIT) entry for the first CCN Name. 13. The network device of claim 12, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to determine whether a PIT entry exists for the second CCN Name. 14. The network device of claim 12, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to forward the second CCN reply according to the PIT entry for the first CCN Name. 15. A computing device to execute a plurality of virtual machines for implementing network function virtualization (NFV), wherein a virtual machine from the plurality of virtual machines is configured to implement a method for route transforming, the computing device in a content centric networking (CCN) 

 gateway or CCN router, where the CCN gateway or CCN router is part of a CCN network, the method to transform a CCN Name in a CCN request before forwarding in the CCN network, the computing device comprising: a non-transitory computer-readable medium (848) having stored therein a route transforming module; and a processor (842) coupled to the non-transitory computer-readable medium, the processor configured to execute the virtual machine, the virtual machine configured to execute the route transforming module, the route transforming module configured to receive a first CCN request including a first CCN Name, the first CCN Name including a route transformer identifier, to generate a modified first CCN Name by removing the route transformer identifier from the first CCN Name, to generate a second CCN Name from the modified first CCN Name, and to generate a second CCN request including the second CCN Name. 16. The computing device of claim 15, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to generate a pending interest table (PIT) entry for the first CCN Name from the first CCN Request. 17. The computing device of claim 16, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to generate a PIT entry for the second CCN request that associates the first CCN Name, a transform configuration, and the second CCN Name. 18. The computing device of claim 17, wherein the transform configuration identifies a process for generating the first CCN Name from the second CCN Name or a process for modifying a data portion of the second CCN Name. 19. The computing device of claim 15, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to receive a first CCN reply including the second CCN 

 Name, to apply a transform configuration to the second CCN Name to obtain CCN reply data, and to generate a second CCN reply using the CCN reply data and the first CCN Name from a pending interest table (PIT) entry for the first CCN Name. 20. The computing device of claim 19, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to determine whether a PIT entry exists for the second CCN Name. 21. The computing device of claim 19, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to forward the second CCN reply according to the PIT entry for the first CCN Name. 22. A control plane device configured to implement a control plane of a software defined networking (SDN) network including a plurality of network devices forming a content centric network, the control plane device implementing a method for route transforming, the control plane device in a content centric networking (CCN) gateway or CCN router, where the CCN gateway or CCN router is part of a CCN network, the method to transform a CCN Name in a CCN request before forwarding in the CCN network, the control plane device comprising: a non-transitory computer-readable medium (948) having stored therein a route transforming module; and a processor (942) coupled to the non-transitory computer-readable medium, the processor configured to execute the route transforming module, the route transforming module configured to receive a first CCN request including a first CCN Name, the first CCN Name including a route transformer identifier, to generate a modified first CCN Name by removing the route transformer identifier from the first CCN Name, to generate a second CCN Name from the modified first CCN Name, and to 

 generate a second CCN request including the second CCN 23. The control plane device of claim 22, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to generate a pending interest table (PIT) entry for the first CCN Name from the first CCN Request. 24. The control plane device of claim 23, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to generate a PIT entry for the second CCN request that associates the first CCN Name, a transform configuration, and the second CCN Name. 25. The control plane device of claim 24, wherein the transform configuration identifies a process for generating the first CCN Name from the second CCN Name or a process for modifying a data portion of the second CCN Name. 26. The control plane device of claim 22, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to receive a first CCN reply including the second CCN Name, to apply a transform configuration to the second CCN Name to obtain CCN reply data, and to generate a second CCN reply using the CCN reply data and the first CCN Name from a pending interest table (PIT) entry for the first CCN Name. 27. The control plane device of claim 26, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to determine whether a PIT entry exists for the second CCN Name. 28. The control plane device of claim 26, wherein the route transforming module is further configured to forward the second CCN reply according to the PIT entry for the first CCN Name.
